claim: For all integers n > 1, n is prime if and only if (n-1)! + 1 is divisible by n.
predicate: all((not (n > 1)) or (is_prime(n) == ((factorial(n-1) + 1) % n == 0)) for n in range(-500, 501) if n > 1)

claim: For all integers n > 4, if n is composite then (n-1)! is divisible by n.
predicate: all((not (n > 4)) or (not is_prime(n)) or (factorial(n-1) % n == 0) for n in range(-500, 501) if n > 4)

claim: For all integers n > 1, if n is prime then n divides (n-2)! - 1.
predicate: all((not (n > 1)) or (not is_prime(n)) or ((factorial(n-2) - 1) % n == 0) for n in range(-500, 501) if n > 1)

claim: For all integers n > 1, if (n-1)! + 1 is divisible by n and n is not prime, then n is a square of a prime.
predicate: all((not (n > 1)) or (not ((factorial(n-1) + 1) % n == 0)) or is_prime(n) or (any(is_prime(p) and p*p == n for p in range(2, int(n**0.5)+1))) for n in range(-500, 501) if n > 1)

claim: For all integers n > 2, if n is prime then n divides (n-3)! - (n-1)/2.
predicate: all((not (n > 2)) or (not is_prime(n)) or ((factorial(n-3) - (n-1)//2) % n == 0) for n in range(-500, 501) if n > 2)

claim: For all integers n > 4, if n is composite and not the square of a prime, then (n-1)! is divisible by n^2.
predicate: all((not (n > 4)) or (not (not is_prime(n) and not any(is_prime(p) and p*p == n for p in range(2, int(n**0.5)+1)))) or (factorial(n-1) % (n*n) == 0) for n in range(-500, 501) if n > 4)
